did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a position statement and literature review by the EADV AI Task Force. It discusses the deployment, risks, and regulatory frameworks of AI-assisted smartphone apps for skin disease but does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods to obtain new study results or perform original diagnostic experiments.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
